# Project Charter (Candidate — generated from contaminated BRD)

*This candidate was generated by Stage CD's Phase 1 from a Stage 1 BRD
that contained the `1GX` fabrication. The comparator pairs
`IN-SCOPE-7` to the authored `OUT-SCOPE-3` via Jaccard similarity over
the canonical token bag (`{finance, integration, payment, processing,
1gx}` ∩ `{finance, integration, payment, processing}` = 4; union = 5;
J = 4/5 = 0.8). The kind change `OUT-SCOPE → IN-SCOPE` triggers the
`scope` classification, blocking QG-CD-01.*

### OBJ-1: Reduce form-correction cycles

Reduce the rate of forms returned for correction by 50% within 12
months of launch.

### IN-SCOPE-1: Online application intake

Online application intake is in scope for v1.

### IN-SCOPE-7: Payment processing finance 1GX integration

Payment processing and Finance-systems integration via 1GX is now in
scope. The applicant will use the 1GX channels.

### STAKEHOLDER-1: Sponsor

Departmental PMO is the sponsor of record for the v1 cutover.
